test_patch:
diff --git a/test/units/utils/test_display_proxy.py b/test/units/utils/test_display_proxy.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000..941bdb9099
--- /dev/null
+++ b/test/units/utils/test_display_proxy.py
@@ -0,0 +1,139 @@
+from __future__ import absolute_import, division, print_function
+__metaclass__ = type
+
+import re
+from collections import deque
+from unittest.mock import MagicMock
+
+import ansible.plugins.strategy as strategy_module
+
+from ansible.executor.task_queue_manager import DisplaySend, FinalQueue
+from ansible.utils.display import Display
+from ansible.utils.multiprocessing import context as multiprocessing_context
+
+
+def test_display_from_worker_proxies_with_method_literal_and_raw_newline():
+    def target():
+        queue = MagicMock()
+        display = Display()
+        display.set_queue(queue)
+
+        display.display(
+            'worker message',
+            color='green',
+            stderr=True,
+            screen_only=True,
+            log_only=False,
+            newline=True,
+        )
+
+        queue.send_display.assert_called_once_with(
+            'displaytocurrentuser',
+            'worker message',
+            color='green',
+            stderr=True,
+            screen_only=True,
+            log_only=False,
+            newline=False,
+        )
+
+    proc = multiprocessing_context.Process(target=target)
+    proc.start()
+    proc.join()
+    assert proc.exitcode == 0
+
+
+def test_warning_from_worker_proxies_raw_message_without_worker_formatting():
+    def target():
+        queue = MagicMock()
+        display = Display()
+        display.set_queue(queue)
+
+        display.warning('warning from worker', formatted=True)
+
+        queue.send_display.assert_called_once_with(
+            'sendwarningtouser',
+            'warning from worker',
+            formatted=True,
+        )
+
+    proc = multiprocessing_context.Process(target=target)
+    proc.start()
+    proc.join()
+    assert proc.exitcode == 0
+
+
+def test_final_queue_send_display_stores_method_timestamp_and_payload(monkeypatch):
+    queue = FinalQueue()
+    put = MagicMock()
+    monkeypatch.setattr(queue, 'put', put)
+
+    queue.send_display('displaytocurrentuser', 'queued message', newline=False)
+
+    put.assert_called_once()
+    result = put.call_args.args[0]
+
+    assert isinstance(result, DisplaySend)
+    assert result.method == 'displaytocurrentuser'
+    assert re.match(r'^\d{4}-\d{3}T\d{6}Z$', result.timestamp)
+    assert result.args == ('queued message',)
+    assert result.kwargs == {'newline': False}
+
+
+def test_results_thread_main_prints_timestamp_and_dispatches_by_method(capsys, mocker):
+    test_display = Display()
+    test_display._final_q = None
+    dispatched = MagicMock()
+    test_display.displaytocurrentuser = dispatched
+    mocker.patch.object(strategy_module, 'display', test_display)
+
+    class FakeQueue:
+        def __init__(self, items):
+            self._items = deque(items)
+
+        def get(self):
+            return self._items.popleft()
+
+    strategy = MagicMock()
+    strategy._final_q = FakeQueue([
+        DisplaySend('displaytocurrentuser', '2025-071T143000Z', 'queued output', newline=False),
+        strategy_module._sentinel,
+    ])
+
+    strategy_module.results_thread_main(strategy)
+
+    out, err = capsys.readouterr()
+
+    assert out == '2025-071T143000Z\n'
+    assert err == ''
+    dispatched.assert_called_once_with('queued output', newline=False)
+
+
+def test_results_thread_main_applies_warning_formatting_and_global_dedup(capsys, mocker):
+    mocker.patch('ansible.utils.color.ANSIBLE_COLOR', False)
+
+    test_display = Display()
+    test_display._final_q = None
+    test_display._warns = {}
+    mocker.patch.object(strategy_module, 'display', test_display)
+
+    class FakeQueue:
+        def __init__(self, items):
+            self._items = deque(items)
+
+        def get(self):
+            return self._items.popleft()
+
+    strategy = MagicMock()
+    strategy._final_q = FakeQueue([
+        DisplaySend('sendwarningtouser', '2025-071T143000Z', 'duplicate warning', formatted=False),
+        DisplaySend('sendwarningtouser', '2025-071T143001Z', 'duplicate warning', formatted=False),
+        strategy_module._sentinel,
+    ])
+
+    strategy_module.results_thread_main(strategy)
+
+    out, err = capsys.readouterr()
+
+    assert out == '2025-071T143000Z\n2025-071T143001Z\n'
+    assert err == '[WARNING]: duplicate warning\n'
